narrative:
Precinct Twin South (precinct in Ross County) has 649 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a clear Republican lean of 11.4 percentage points.
